CustomField.description: The URL needed to display the image
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(sugati__SBI_External_Image_URL__c )), sugati__SBI_External_Image_URL__c, IF( CONTAINS(TEXT($Profile.UserType), 'Partner'), IF( sugati__S_SBI_Is_File__c, BLANKVALUE($Setup.sugati__Site__c.sugati__Content_Host_Name__c, '') & '/sfc/servlet.shepherd/version/download/' & sugati__SBI_Attachement_Id__c, BLANKVALUE($Setup.sugati__Site__c.sugati__Content_Host_Name__c, '') & '/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=' & sugati__SBI_Attachement_Id__c ), IF( sugati__S_SBI_Is_File__c, '/sfc/servlet.shepherd/version/download/' & sugati__SBI_Attachement_Id__c, '/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=' & sugati__SBI_Attachement_Id__c ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The URL needed to display the image
CustomField.label: Image URL
